content: Hey guys! I just started and saw the flare guide late, did I mess up by starting with Jenkin? Also should I be saving my silver or keep pulling on the standard aqueros banner
Your cooked. Its over. Gg go next.

Aequor Tawil
Corrosion Procs
Burst Aequor
Sanga Exalt + Naut Exalt
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/10UVim8m1SnY9fSDKfaH4AwnPPd22zsCDDNB6SV15yO4/edit?usp=drivesdk

This Google Sheets, shows all Posse’s on the Possee tab. You can look for which ones interest you the most, or fit your team’s needs. The only Posse(I can think of and know for sure is “strong”) is Myriam Posse, Allows Draw 2 and gain 2 Arithma. Her Posse is 7 Reality thingies to unlock in the Event Tabs.

Depends on what Archetype, Realm, Mechanics, Awakeners you want to run.

Archetypes: Tentacles/Poison/Counter/Str Stacking, etc

Realm: Chaos/Aequor/Caro/Ultra

Mechanics: Corrosion Proccing/Spam Attacks/Infinite Card and Arithma/One Tapping, etc

Awakeners: Ramona/Agrippa/Castor/Tawil, etc
This comp can work. With more investment for Castor, he can be put into a whole nother team as a Carry. That way you won’t have two Carries in one team.

Clem could go on another team as well, but for both, Clem and Castor, it comes down to how strong you Kathigu is. At higher invest, Kathigu can keep you alive, and deal enough damage, all by herself. Thus Castor and Clem arent need.
Variables are subject to change depending on what Awakeners you have and at what Enlightenments.

Jenkin is very solid for early game and engame. Silver SHOULD NEVER be used for standard pulls, and saved only for limited pulls. Keep pulling on Aequor, and once you Celeste, Goliath, Sanga, and Carcus(which I see you do), then you can pull on other banners, OR use you standard Awakener selectors for specific Awakeners.
awesome, what about if he has almost all aequor units + nautila, is there anything he can do that can take him to around chapter 8?

Chaos: Karen/Nautila
Caro: Faint
Ultra: Jenkin/Winkle
Once you have these Awakeners, and used your silver and gotten more Limited Awakeners, then you can challenge D-Tide.
Furthermore, any Standard Pulls going forward after you’ve gotten those Awakeners, should be used for pulling WoDs.

<@138497441346486273>
For wheels(WoDs), I wouldn’t recommended pulling each characters “Signature Wheel”, but rather wheels that are just best for each role(Dps/Support/Survive)
The No.1 WoD everyone recommends is +12 Titan’s Blade for Dps
The No.1 WoD for Support is +12 Incalculable Favor

Other WoDs you might want are Path Forsaken/Bloody Feast/Chains Unbound/Fin of Sorrow/Death of Miss Coral/Memory Spiral
Erm, that would depend on what those Awakeners that are used with OE Sanga.
It would depend on investment of the overall team, skill and understanding, and lastly, how badly they want to beat Chp 7 with  OE Sanga.
if he want with e3 caecus, e3 goliath sanga oe and nautila you think that'd be feasible? its just that I have no idea if goliath's str scaling helps at all with shields
I never play aequor characters so I dunno if goliath has any shield synergy in the long run
caecus i can see it workin but hes overall a nice staple in aequor teams
What limited awakener is worth pulling for then?
Also where do I get the selectors from?
Selectors should be gotten from Levelling Acc Lvl and at Event Tab
Depends on what team you want to play.
^ See this msg
Okay thank you I will have a look at comps!
For Chapter 8, it is near mandatory to run Hameln, and OE Sanga doesnt scale with Strength but Shield. It might be possible(according to another source) but very hard.
Goliath wants to be played around STR scalers, so he has zero purpose here.
Caecus can be flexed near anywhere, and with OE Sanga, its fine
OE Sanga is very Aliemus hungry which is why you run the comp above. If not, then at least run Winkle to feed Sanga Aliemus.
However to that, Nautila feeds Aliemus, albeit much less, and allows for a bigger burst Sanga Exalt.

the game has been and is still getting balanced, that aside try not to listen too much to people's opinions, especially flares ultra hate.
ive started with ultra, still play ultra, its the most fun for me and im doing just great, for almost 90% of the characters being "bad" just means they are harder to play and require more investment over time with dupes and skill upgrades/accessories, the whales or meta team clear endgame content at like turn 1-3 when requirements are usually 12-15 for 3 stars so the game is difficult but isnt too restricting that doing things your way will just ruin your experience, welcome and have fun!
"bricking your account" is f2p myth made by non f2p players, go for it if you like them

hell yeah, it just irks me how poorly ultra was recieved because of flares.
playstyle-wise as u may have noticed all characters want to stack a specific way to deal with larger threaths at the end of an exploration, with whichever a character infinitely scales of. having played all i genuinely dont think every realm has a "main goal" and they are a lot more like utility and tools and molds to build arounif u like tentacles, tulu and Erika can be nice
I think a big part of that also has to do with Ultra's realm mechanic not providing any defensive tools whatsoever
Caro smooths over your general loss of life with the blood pool, which is very competitive with incoming damage in easy early chapters, and Aequor tentacles are just... like that
in general, ultra gives u an extra round, caro gives u health and (30aliemus-crir chancse boost) cards and chaos is keyflare and death resistance
nor heals, from mechanic or units, unless u have clementine u have 0 healing potential p .p

Hey, I just came back cause I've heard about the anniversary. I just recently got Castor (before losing to Casiah two times bro wtf), any other advice for who to save for? I was going to pull for Pollux but I have no pulls left and I've read here he kinda sucks?

Since you’re main dps is Tawil, you probably want Blade of the Titan on Tawil. Tawil Sig is good on Tawil, but your burst turn on her with Exalt and her Wings are weaker. Ideally, you run Tawil Sig, and Blade of Titan +12, together in the future. You could give Caecus, Tawil’s Sig, and Tawil, Blade of Titan. Ramona having Thais Sig is good. Furthermore, I would recommend running “Gluttony” a R/Brown wheel that allows you to forgo a Orison for a percentage Max Hp upgrade, as that will help you survive and heal more. The Cov pieces are fine(for now). Keep up the good work! <:Cheerup:1400771555939844149> <:happy:1356053849894420683> (Posse is good too, Festival of Tides)

Pollux is bad because Jenkins can do what he does at much lower investment (imo Pollux may get better than Jenkins at around E3ish depending on the situation)

Next target can defo be Tawil in 1-2 weeks if you’re willing to go all in and get several dupes

Kinda same thing with Castor, you can also consider getting some dupes to make him better although he’a A-OK at E0


also you already got the most important peeps from Aequor, imo if you haven’t hit a realm banner yet and are missing lost of the awakeners there go there except maybe Caro, and if you’re good on that front go into the wheel banner and never leave untill you +12 Titan’s Blade and then Incalculable Factor and then every other wheel

GHelot is not recommended for beginners due to several reasons. One being low hp pool due to Account Lvl and Awakener Levels. If you still want to run her, I would need to see your other choices of Awakeners, and what you are struggling with. If you’re doing fine, ignore everything I said, and keep going. Get that Blade of Titan to +12. Until you struggle(cause of GHelot killing you), then I can help~ <:Cheerup:1400771555939844149> <:slick:1356053160531198064>

You could literally play anything as Chapter 2 is too early for “comp” to matter. Your lack of Awakeners, Limited and Standard, make it so there isn’t exactly a archetype or ability/effect you can build around. If you want my personal team with your current awakeners, it would be Myriam, Aurita, Celeste, Horla OR Helot, Thais, Aigis, Faint.
You lack certain Awakeners to run Pollux “optimally”, but you could still play him as you are early on enough to just have fun! <:happy:1356053849894420683>

Flares is a really good player, but you need to remember he is also a content creator. Content creators dramatize and have “inside jokes” that can confused new players. I would say Flares guides are inconsistent in the sense of sometimes its true, sometimes its dramatized. The only way you could know the difference is if you’re a veteran Morimens player. So when a newbie comes to Flares for information, they can’t tell the difference between the two. Once again, Flares is a player that has cleared all of endgame and consistently does highest difficulty endgame mode called D-Tide. However, he is a content creator. The pluses of Flares is that he is willing to coach you if you ask for help, and furthermore, if you @ him as a player in this server, he will help you. If you interact with his videos as a viewer, you will get confusing and bias, and dramatized, and inside jokes information <@1093160650290774106>
